heading: Today
text: Becoming mostly cloudy.  Snow showers spreading northeast this morning, mixing with rain in southern valleys, tapering off west to east this afternoon, with a few breaks of sun.  A dusting to two inches, highest over the higher terrain.  Cold.  Highs from 30 to 40 north to south.  Light winds becoming north to northwest near 10 mph, gusting to 25 mph this afternoon.

heading: Tonight
text: Becoming mostly clear and cold.  Lows in the teens to low 20s, near 10 in the colder mountain valleys.  Winds northwest near 10 mph, gusting to 25 mph this evening, diminishing to light and variable.

heading: Wednesday
text: Mostly sunny.  Not as cold.  Highs from 40 to 50 north to south.  Light winds, becoming south near 10 mph through the Champlain Valley.
